points.description: Every numbered government or regulatory requirement clause extracted from the document

point_id.description: Official numbering such as 2.6.5, Article 3, TFS-REQ-03

title.description: Short title of the requirement point

text.description: Full verbatim requirement text including all sub-conditions

page_hint.description: Approximate page number in source document if visible

point_type.description: mandatory = enforceable requirement to compare; informational = introduction/purpose/background (skip compare); definition = glossary term only (skip compare)
